findings.title: Insecure HTTP connection
findings.description: Plain HTTP traffic can be intercepted

findings.title: Unsafe cast (as)
findings.description: Unsafe cast will throw ClassCastException if type doesn't match
findings.suggested_fix: Use safe cast 'as?' and handle the null case

findings.title: Force unwrap operator (!!)
findings.description: Force unwrap can cause NullPointerException at runtime
findings.suggested_fix: Use safe call (?.), elvis operator (?:), or requireNotNull() with a message
